Please create an archive index for this week's outputs (day21-day25), JSON format, save to day25/. List all files created or modified during the week, with filename, type (new/modified), and created_at or modified_at timestamps. Add meta object.

content.text:

arguments.command: ls -d day21 day22 day23 day24 day25 2>/dev/null || true

printf '%s | task_id=archive_index_week2 | Created day25/20260317_archive_index_sprint9_week2.json (archive index for day21-day25; missing day21-day24 in workspace)\n' "2026-03-17T16:30:11+08:00" >> done.log
